# phoenixd-mcp-server

> MCP server that connects a phoenixd Bitcoin Lightning wallet to LLMs and AI agents. Enables AI assistants to send and receive Lightning payments, manage on-chain Bitcoin, and query node state via the Phoenixd API.

## What it does

This server implements the [Model Context Protocol (MCP)](https://modelcontextprotocol.io) to expose phoenixd Lightning node capabilities as tools that any MCP-compatible LLM or AI agent can call.

Use cases:
- AI agents that pay for services autonomously via Lightning
- LLM assistants that can receive payments on behalf of users
- Automated Bitcoin payment workflows orchestrated by AI

## Installation

```bash
npx -y phoenixd-mcp-server
```

Requires a running [phoenixd](https://phoenix.acinq.co/server) node.

## Configuration (Claude Desktop)

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "phoenixd-mcp-server": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "phoenixd-mcp-server"],
      "env": {
        "HTTP_PASSWORD": "<phoenixd_http_password>",
        "HTTP_PROTOCOL": "http",
        "HTTP_HOST": "127.0.0.1",
        "HTTP_PORT": "9740"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

## Available Tools

### Payment Tools

- `create-invoice` — Create a BOLT11 invoice. Params: `description` (required), `amountSat`, `expirySeconds`, `externalId`, `webhookUrl`.
- `create-offer` — Create a BOLT12 offer. Params: `description` (required), `amountSat`, `expirySeconds`.
- `pay-invoice` — Pay a BOLT11 invoice. Params: `invoice` (required), `amountMsat`, `externalId`.
- `pay-offer` — Pay a BOLT12 offer. Params: `offer` (required), `amountMsat` (required), `externalId`.
- `pay-lightning-address` — Pay a Lightning Address (e.g. user@domain.com). Params: `address` (required), `amountSat` (required), `comment`.
- `pay-on-chain` — Send an on-chain Bitcoin payment. Params: `address` (required), `amountSat` (required), `feerateSatByte`.
- `bump-fee` — Bump fee of an unconfirmed on-chain transaction. Params: `txId` (required), `feerateSatByte` (required).
- `list-incoming-payments` — List received payments. Params: `from`, `to`, `limit`, `offset`, `all`, `externalId`.
- `get-incoming-payment` — Get a specific incoming payment by hash. Params: `paymentHash` (required).
- `list-outgoing-payments` — List sent payments. Params: `from`, `to`, `limit`, `offset`, `externalId`.
- `get-outgoing-payment` — Get a specific outgoing payment by hash. Params: `paymentHash` (required).

### Node Management Tools

- `get-node-info` — Get Lightning node info (node ID, alias, version).
- `get-balance` — Get current wallet balance (on-chain and Lightning).
- `list-channels` — List all Lightning channels and their state.
- `close-channel` — Close a channel. Params: `channelId` (required), `address` (required), `feerateSatByte` (required).
- `decode-invoice` — Decode a BOLT11 invoice. Params: `invoice` (required).
- `decode-offer` — Decode a BOLT12 offer. Params: `offer` (required).

## Links

- [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/phoenixd-mcp-server)
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Sharmaz/phoenixd-mcp-server)
- [phoenixd documentation](https://phoenix.acinq.co/server)
